questions.question: What is the greatest common factor of $12$ and $18$?
A basketball player scored $15$ points in the first quarter and $20$ points in the second quarter. What is the greatest common factor of these two numbers?
Factor out the greatest common factor from the expression $8x + 12y$
A cyclist rode $24$ miles in the morning and $30$ miles in the afternoon. What is the greatest common factor of these two distances?
Simplify the expression $9x^2 + 12x$ by factoring out the greatest common factor
A swimmer completed $18$ laps in the first heat and $24$ laps in the second heat. What is the greatest common factor of these two numbers?
Factor out the greatest common factor from the expression $16x^2 + 20x$
A golfer scored $20$ points on the first hole and $25$ points on the second hole. What is the greatest common factor of these two numbers?
Simplify the expression $12x^3 + 18x^2$ by factoring out the greatest common factor. Show all your work.

A football player ran $24$ yards in the first quarter and $30$ yards in the second quarter. What is the greatest common factor of these two distances? Use this information to simplify the expression $8x + 10y$, where $x$ represents the distance run in the first quarter and $y$ represents the distance run in the second quarter.

teacher_rules: Identify the greatest common factor of two or more numbers
Apply factoring to real-world problems involving sports and fitness
